name: Grape Spoon Sweet

ingredients.item: Remove from heat, and cool for several hours before adding into preserve jars. Refrigerate.

method: Clean and destem the grapes. In a saucepan, combine the grapes, sugar, water, cinnamon powder and clove powder. Bring to a boil. Then, lower the heat to medium. Cook time for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
Remove from heat, and cool for several hours before adding into preserve jars. Refrigerate.
